title: Luxury Editorial Composition From Reference
sourceTitle: Image To Image Luxury Watch Split Panel Campaign AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image luxury 1:1 watch campaign using reference image for luxury editorial split-panel layout and typography placement, preserving the reference composition while building a premium split-panel advertisement for VANTORÉ. Subject: handsome adult male model with sharp jawline, slick-back hair, sage green double-breasted suit, cream shirt, and visible silver automatic wristwatch occupies the left panel and different adult male model with wavy textured hair, light beard, burgundy turtleneck, charcoal trousers, and long dark coat occupies the right panel; both adult male models stay visually distinct and clearly showcase luxury wristwatches. Scene: Left panel uses a warm beige architectural studio with a curved arch; right panel uses a matte navy geometric studio with modern luxury lighting gradients; bottom corners include luxury watch product shots. Composition: Preserve the uploaded reference image layout, typography placement, clean architectural styling, and premium advertisement balance as the fixed image-to-image structure; keep the two side-by-side panels, center branding, and bottom product-shot rhythm. Signature Elements: Preserved image to image luxury watch split panel campaign source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Vogue Men editorial photography, Rolex advertising aesthetic, Omega luxury campaign style, premium men fashion magazine cover, Hasselblad medium-format realism, photorealistic skin, sharp facial detail, modern masculine elegance, and commercial advertising masterpiece finish. Color Palette: Fixed warm beige, soft sand, matte navy, charcoal, burgundy, sage green, cream, silver watch metal, gold button highlights, and clean luxury neutrals. Lighting: Cinematic luxury campaign lighting with soft architectural shadows, polished facial highlights, watch glints, and controlled modern studio gradients. Typography: VANTORÉ appears as the large center brand; TIME REDEFINED / CRAFTED FOR LEADERS / Swiss Made Collection / Precision - Prestige - Performance appears as readable premium campaign copy with short lines only. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
